title: Dan Dan Noodles
description: A spicy Sichuan dish featuring ground pork and dan dan mian noodles, topped with a savory sauce and garnished with peanuts and scallions.
instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook ground pork over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spatula as it cooks.
Add the dan dan paste, soy sauce, and chili oil to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the pork is coated.
Stir in the scallions and peanuts.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of noodles on a plate, then top with the pork mixture.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve immediately.
